29â†’sealed class AuthorFilterListItemUIState(

32â†’    open val isSelected: Boolean
33â†’) {

35â†’        AuthorFilterListItemUIState(

37â†’            text = UiStringRes(R.string.everyone),

40â†’
41â†’    data class Me(val avatarUrl: String?, override val isSelected: Boolean) :
42â†’        AuthorFilterListItemUIState(

46â†’        )

48â†’
49â†’fun getAuthorFilterItems(
50â†’    selection: AuthorFilterSelection,
51â†’    avatarUrl: String?
52â†’): List<AuthorFilterListItemUIState> {
53â†’    return AuthorFilterSelection.values().map { value ->

55â†’            ME -> AuthorFilterListItemUIState.Me(avatarUrl, selection == value)
56â†’            EVERYONE -> AuthorFilterListItemUIState.Everyone(
57â†’                selection == value,
58â†’                R.drawable.ic_people_white_24dp
59â†’            )
60â†’        }
61â†’    }
62â†’}

217â†’                    itemView.context,
218â†’                    statusColor
219â†’                )
220â†’            )
221â†’        }
222â†’    }
223â†’
224â†’    private fun showFeaturedImage(imageUrl: String?) {
225â†’        if (!imageUrl.isNullOrBlank() && imageUrl == loadedFeaturedImgUrl) {
226â†’            // Suppress blinking as the media upload progresses
227â†’            return
228â†’        }
229â†’        if (imageUrl.isNullOrBlank()) {
230â†’            featuredImageView.visibility = View.GONE
231â†’            imageManager.cancelRequestAndClearImageView(featuredImageView)
232â†’        } else {
233â†’            featuredImageView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
234â†’            imageManager.load(featuredImageView, ImageType.PHOTO, imageUrl, ScaleType.CENTER_CROP)
235â†’        }
236â†’        loadedFeaturedImgUrl = imageUrl
237â†’    }
238â†’
239â†’    private fun setTint(context: Context, drawable: Drawable, color: Int): Drawable {
240â†’        val wrappedDrawable: Drawable = DrawableCompat.wrap(drawable)
241â†’        if (color != 0) {
242â†’            val iconColor = context.getColorFromAttribute(color)
243â†’            DrawableCompat.setTint(wrappedDrawable, iconColor)
244â†’        }
245â†’        return wrappedDrawable
246â†’    }
247â†’
248â†’    @Suppress("ComplexMethod")
249â†’    private fun getMenuItemTitleWithIcon(context: Context, item: PostListItemAction): SpannableStringBuilder {
250â†’        var icon: Drawable? = setTint(
251â†’            context,
252â†’            context.getDrawable(item.buttonType.iconResId)!!, item.buttonType.colorAttrId
253â†’        )
254â†’        // If there's no icon, we insert a transparent one to keep the title aligned with the items which have icons.
255â†’        if (icon == null) icon = ColorDrawable(Color.TRANSPARENT)
256â†’        val iconSize: Int = context.getResources().getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.menu_item_icon_size)
257â†’        icon.setBounds(0, 0, iconSize, iconSize)
258â†’        val imageSpan = ImageSpan(icon)
259â†’
260â†’        // Add a space placeholder for the icon, before the title.
261â†’        val menuTitle = context.getText(item.buttonType.textResId)
262â†’        val ssb = SpannableStringBuilder(
263â†’            menuTitle.padStart(menuTitle.length + POST_LIST_ICON_PADDING)
264â†’        )
265â†’
266â†’        // Replace the space placeholder with the icon.
267â†’        ssb.setSpan(imageSpan, 1, 2, 0)
268â†’        return ssb
269â†’    }
270â†’}

446â†’            _snackBarMessage.value = SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.error_post_does_not_exist))
447â†’        }
448â†’    }
449â†’
450â†’    // BasicFragmentDialog Events
451â†’
452â†’    fun onPositiveClickedForBasicDialog(instanceTag: String) {
453â†’        postListDialogHelper.onPositiveClickedForBasicDialog(
454â†’            instanceTag = instanceTag,
455â†’            trashPostWithLocalChanges = postActionHandler::trashPostWithLocalChanges,

487â†’        _openPrepublishingBottomSheet.postValue(Event(Unit))
488â†’    }
489â†’
490â†’    /**
491â†’     * Only the non-null variables will be changed in the current state
492â†’     */
493â†’    @SuppressLint("NullSafeMutableLiveData")
494â†’    private fun updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange(
495â†’        isFabVisible: Boolean? = null,
496â†’        isAuthorFilterVisible: Boolean? = null,
497â†’        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection? = null,
498â†’        authorFilterItems: List<AuthorFilterListItemUIState>? = null
499â†’    ) {
500â†’        val currentState = requireNotNull(viewState.value) {
501â†’            "updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange should not be called before the initial state is set"
502â†’        }
503â†’
504â†’        _viewState.value = PostListMainViewState(
505â†’            isFabVisible ?: currentState.isFabVisible,
506â†’            isAuthorFilterVisible ?: currentState.isAuthorFilterVisible,
507â†’            authorFilterSelection ?: currentState.authorFilterSelection,
508â†’            authorFilterItems ?: currentState.authorFilterItems
509â†’        )
510â†’
511â†’        if (authorFilterSelection != null && currentState.authorFilterSelection != authorFilterSelection) {
512â†’            _authorSelectionUpdated.value = authorFilterSelection
513â†’
514â†’            AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(
515â†’                POST_LIST_AUTHOR_FILTER_CHANGED,
516â†’                site,
517â†’                mutableMapOf(TRACKS_SELECTED_AUTHOR_FILTER to authorFilterSelection.toString() as Any)
518â†’            )
519â†’        }

523â†’        val listTypeIdentifier = PostListDescriptor.calculateTypeIdentifier(site.id)
524â†’        dispatcher.dispatch(ListActionBuilder.newListDataInvalidatedAction(listTypeIdentifier))
525â†’    }

528â†’        val listTypeIdentifier = PostListDescriptor.calculateTypeIdentifier(site.id)
529â†’        dispatcher.dispatch(ListActionBuilder.newListRequiresRefreshAction(listTypeIdentifier))
530â†’    }
531â†’
532â†’    private fun isRemotePreviewingFromPostsList() = _previewState.value != null &&
533â†’            _previewState.value != PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE
534â†’
535â†’    private fun hasRemoteAutoSavePreviewError() = _previewState.value != null &&
536â†’            _previewState.value == PostListRemotePreviewState.REMOTE_AUTO_SAVE_PREVIEW_ERROR

538â†’    private fun checkNetworkConnection(): Boolean =
539â†’        if (networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
540â†’            true
541â†’        } else {
542â†’            _toastMessage.postValue(ToastMessageHolder(R.string.no_network_message, Duration.SHORT))
543â†’            false
544â†’        }

546â†’    fun handleRemotePreviewClosing() {
547â†’        updatePreviewAndDialogState(PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE, PostInfoType.PostNoInfo)
548â†’    }
549â†’
550â†’    private fun updatePreviewAndDialogState(newState: PostListRemotePreviewState, postInfo: PostInfoType) {
551â†’        // We need only transitions, so...
552â†’        if (_previewState.value == newState) return
553â†’
554â†’        AppLog.d(
555â†’            AppLog.T.POSTS,
556â†’            "Posts list preview state machine: transition from ${_previewState.value} to $newState"
557â†’        )
558â†’
559â†’        // update the state
560â†’        val prevState = _previewState.value
561â†’        _previewState.postValue(newState)
562â†’
563â†’        // take care of exit actions on state transition
564â†’        previewStateHelper.managePreviewStateTransitions(
565â†’            newState,
566â†’            prevState,
567â†’            postInfo,
568â†’            postActionHandler::handleRemotePreview
569â†’        )
570â†’    }
571â†’
572â†’    fun toggleViewLayout() {
573â†’        val currentLayoutType = viewLayoutType.value ?: PostListViewLayoutType.defaultValue
574â†’        val toggledValue = when (currentLayoutType) {
575â†’            STANDARD -> COMPACT

577â†’        }

579â†’        setViewLayoutAndIcon(toggledValue, true)

1â†’package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
  2â†’
  3â†’import android.os.Bundle
  4â†’import android.text.TextUtils
  5â†’import android.view.LayoutInflater
  6â†’import android.view.View
  7â†’import android.view.ViewGroup
  8â†’import android.widget.Button
  9â†’import android.widget.ProgressBar
 10â†’import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
 11â†’import androidx.lifecycle.Observer
 12â†’import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider
 13â†’import androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager
 14â†’import androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView
 15â†’import org.wordpress.android.R
 16â†’import org.wordpress.android.WordPress
 17â†’import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 18â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.ActionableEmptyView
 19â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.ViewPagerFragment
 20â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PostListType.SEARCH
 21â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PostListViewLayoutType.COMPACT
 22â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PostListViewLayoutType.STANDARD
 23â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.adapters.PostListAdapter
 24â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiHelpers
 25â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 26â†’import org.wordpress.android.util.DisplayUtils
 27â†’import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtils
 28â†’import org.wordpress.android.util.ToastUtils
 29â†’import org.wordpress.android.util.WPSwipeToRefreshHelper.buildSwipeToRefreshHelper
 30â†’import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getSerializableCompat
 31â†’import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getSerializableExtraCompat
 32â†’import org.wordpress.android.util.helpers.SwipeToRefreshHelper
 33â†’import org.wordpress.android.util.image.ImageManager
 34â†’import org.wordpress.android.util.widgets.CustomSwipeRefreshLayout
 35â†’import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PagedPostList
 36â†’import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListEmptyUiState
 37â†’import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemIdentifier.LocalPostId
 38â†’import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListViewModel
 39â†’import org.wordpress.android.widgets.RecyclerItemDecoration
 40â†’import javax.inject.Inject
 41â†’
 42â†’private const val EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE = "post_list_type"
 43â†’private const val MAX_INDEX_FOR_VISIBLE_ITEM_TO_KEEP_SCROLL_POSITION = 2
 44â†’
 45â†’class PostListFragment : ViewPagerFragment() {
 46â†’    @Inject
 47â†’    internal lateinit var imageManager: ImageManager
 48â†’
 49â†’    @Inject
 50â†’    internal lateinit var viewModelFactory: ViewModelProvider.Factory
 51â†’
 52â†’    @Inject
 53â†’    internal lateinit var uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 54â†’    private lateinit var viewModel: PostListViewModel
 55â†’    private lateinit var mainViewModel: PostListMainViewModel
 56â†’
 57â†’    private var swipeToRefreshHelper: SwipeToRefreshHelper? = null
 58â†’
 59â†’    private var swipeRefreshLayout: CustomSwipeRefreshLayout? = null
 60â†’    private var recyclerView: RecyclerView? = null
 61â†’    private var actionableEmptyView: ActionableEmptyView? = null
 62â†’    private var progressLoadMore: ProgressBar? = null
 63â†’
 64â†’    private lateinit var itemDecorationCompactLayout: RecyclerItemDecoration
 65â†’    private lateinit var itemDecorationStandardLayout: RecyclerItemDecoration
 66â†’
 67â†’    private lateinit var postListType: PostListType
 68â†’
 69â†’    private lateinit var nonNullActivity: FragmentActivity
 70â†’
 71â†’    private val postListAdapter: PostListAdapter by lazy {
 72â†’        PostListAdapter(
 73â†’            context = nonNullActivity,
 74â†’            imageManager = imageManager,
 75â†’            uiHelpers = uiHelpers
 76â†’        )
 77â†’    }
 78â†’
 79â†’    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 80â†’        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
 81â†’        nonNullActivity = requireActivity()
 82â†’        (nonNullActivity.application as WordPress).component().inject(this)
 83â†’
 84â†’        val nonNullIntent = checkNotNull(nonNullActivity.intent)
 85â†’        val site = nonNullIntent.getSerializableExtraCompat<SiteModel>(WordPress.SITE)
 86â†’
 87â†’        if (site == null) {
 88â†’            ToastUtils.showToast(nonNullActivity, R.string.blog_not_found, ToastUtils.Duration.SHORT)
 89â†’            nonNullActivity.finish()
 90â†’        }
 91â†’    }
 92â†’
 93â†’    override fun getScrollableViewForUniqueIdProvision(): View? {
 94â†’        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
 95â†’            return null
 96â†’        }
 97â†’        return recyclerView
 98â†’    }
 99â†’
100â†’    override fun onViewCreated(view: View, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
101â†’        super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState)
102â†’        postListType = requireNotNull(arguments?.getSerializableCompat(EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE))
103â†’
104â†’        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
105â†’            recyclerView?.id = R.id.posts_search_recycler_view_id
106â†’        }
107â†’
108â†’        mainViewModel = ViewModelProvider(nonNullActivity, viewModelFactory)[PostListMainViewModel::class.java]
109â†’
110â†’        mainViewModel.viewLayoutType.observe(viewLifecycleOwner, Observer { optionaLayoutType ->
111â†’            optionaLayoutType?.let { layoutType ->
112â†’                recyclerView?.removeItemDecoration(itemDecorationCompactLayout)
113â†’                recyclerView?.removeItemDecoration(itemDecorationStandardLayout)
114â†’
115â†’                when (layoutType) {
116â†’                    STANDARD -> {
117â†’                        recyclerView?.addItemDecoration(itemDecorationStandardLayout)
118â†’                    }
119â†’                    COMPACT -> {
120â†’                        recyclerView?.addItemDecoration(itemDecorationCompactLayout)
121â†’                    }
122â†’                }
123â†’
124â†’                if (postListAdapter.updateItemLayoutType(layoutType)) {
125â†’                    recyclerView?.scrollToPosition(0)
126â†’                }
127â†’            }
128â†’        })
129â†’
130â†’        mainViewModel.authorSelectionUpdated.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
131â†’            if (it != null) {
132â†’                if (viewModel.updateAuthorFilterIfNotSearch(it)) {
133â†’                    recyclerView?.scrollToPosition(0)
134â†’                }
135â†’            }
136â†’        }
137â†’
138â†’        actionableEmptyView?.updateLayoutForSearch(postListType == SEARCH, 0)
139â†’
140â†’        val postListViewModelConnector = mainViewModel.getPostListViewModelConnector(postListType)
141â†’
142â†’        viewModel = ViewModelProvider(this, viewModelFactory)[PostListViewModel::class.java]
143â†’
144â†’        val displayWidth = DisplayUtils.getWindowPixelWidth(requireContext())
145â†’        val contentSpacing = nonNullActivity.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.content_margin)
146â†’
147â†’        // since the MainViewModel has been already started, we need to manually update the authorFilterSelection value
148â†’        viewModel.start(
149â†’            postListViewModelConnector,
150â†’            mainViewModel.authorSelectionUpdated.value!!,
151â†’            photonWidth = displayWidth - contentSpacing * 2,
152â†’            photonHeight = nonNullActivity.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.reader_featured_image_height)
153â†’        )
154â†’
155â†’        initObservers()
156â†’    }
157â†’
158â†’    private fun initObservers() {
159â†’        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
160â†’            mainViewModel.searchQuery.observe(viewLifecycleOwner, Observer {
161â†’                if (TextUtils.isEmpty(it)) {
162â†’                    postListAdapter.submitList(null)
163â†’                }
164â†’                viewModel.search(it)
165â†’            })
166â†’        }
167â†’
168â†’        viewModel.emptyViewState.observe(viewLifecycleOwner, Observer {
169â†’            it?.let { emptyViewState -> updateEmptyViewForState(emptyViewState) }
170â†’        })
171â†’
172â†’        viewModel.isFetchingFirstPage.observe(viewLifecycleOwner, Observer {
173â†’            swipeRefreshLayout?.isRefreshing = it == true
174â†’        })
175â†’
176â†’        viewModel.pagedListData.observe(viewLifecycleOwner, Observer {
177â†’            it?.let { pagedListData -> updatePagedListData(pagedListData) }
178â†’        })
179â†’
180â†’        viewModel.isLoadingMore.observe(viewLifecycleOwner, Observer {
181â†’            progressLoadMore?.visibility = if (it == true) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
182â†’        })
183â†’        viewModel.scrollToPosition.observe(viewLifecycleOwner, Observer {
184â†’            it?.let { index ->
185â†’                recyclerView?.scrollToPosition(index)
186â†’            }
187â†’        })
188â†’    }
189â†’
190â†’    override fun onCreateView(inflater: LayoutInflater, container: ViewGroup?, savedInstanceState: Bundle?): View? {
191â†’        val view = inflater.inflate(R.layout.post_list_fragment, container, false)
192â†’
193â†’        swipeRefreshLayout = view.findViewById(R.id.ptr_layout)
194â†’        recyclerView = view.findViewById(R.id.recycler_view)
195â†’        progressLoadMore = view.findViewById(R.id.progress)
196â†’        actionableEmptyView = view.findViewById(R.id.actionable_empty_view)
197â†’
198â†’        val context = nonNullActivity
199â†’        itemDecorationStandardLayout = RecyclerItemDecoration(
200â†’            0,
201â†’            context.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.margin_medium)
202â†’        )
203â†’        itemDecorationCompactLayout = RecyclerItemDecoration(
204â†’            0,
205â†’            context.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.list_divider_height)
206â†’        )
207â†’        recyclerView?.layoutManager = LinearLayoutManager(context)
208â†’        recyclerView?.adapter = postListAdapter
209â†’
210â†’        swipeRefreshLayout?.let {
211â†’            swipeToRefreshHelper = buildSwipeToRefreshHelper(it) {
212â†’                if (!NetworkUtils.isNetworkAvailable(nonNullActivity)) {
213â†’                    it.isRefreshing = false
214â†’                } else {
215â†’                    viewModel.swipeToRefresh()
216â†’                }
217â†’            }
218â†’        }
219â†’        return view
220â†’    }
221â†’
222â†’    /**
223â†’     * Updates the data for the adapter while retaining visible item in certain cases.
224â†’     *
225â†’     * PagedList tries to keep the visible item by adding new items outside of the screen while modifying the scroll
226â†’     * position. In most cases, this works out great because it doesn't interrupt to the user. However, after a new
227â†’     * item is inserted at the top while the list is showing the very first items, it feels very weird to not have the
228â†’     * inserted item shown. For example, if a new draft is added there is no indication of it except for the flash
229â†’     * of the scroll bar which is not noticeable unless user is paying attention to it.
230â†’     *
231â†’     * In these cases, we try to keep the scroll position the same instead of keeping the visible item the same by
232â†’     * first saving the state and re-applying it after the data updates are completed. Since `PagedListAdapter` uses
233â†’     * bg thread to calculate the changes, we need to post the change in the bg thread as well so that it'll be applied
234â†’     * after changes are reflected.
235â†’     */
236â†’    private fun updatePagedListData(pagedListData: PagedPostList) {
237â†’        val recyclerViewState = recyclerView?.layoutManager?.onSaveInstanceState()
238â†’        postListAdapter.submitList(pagedListData)
239â†’        recyclerView?.post {
240â†’            (recyclerView?.layoutManager as? LinearLayoutManager)?.let { layoutManager ->
241â†’                if (layoutManager.findFirstVisibleItemPosition() < MAX_INDEX_FOR_VISIBLE_ITEM_TO_KEEP_SCROLL_POSITION) {
242â†’                    layoutManager.onRestoreInstanceState(recyclerViewState)
243â†’                }
244â†’            }
245â†’        }
246â†’    }
247â†’
248â†’    private fun updateEmptyViewForState(state: PostListEmptyUiState) {
249â†’        actionableEmptyView?.let { emptyView ->
250â†’            if (state.emptyViewVisible) {
251â†’                emptyView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
252â†’                uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(emptyView.title, state.title)
253â†’                uiHelpers.setImageOrHide(emptyView.image, state.imgResId)
254â†’                setupButtonOrHide(emptyView.button, state.buttonText, state.onButtonClick)
255â†’            } else {
256â†’                emptyView.visibility = View.GONE
257â†’            }
258â†’        }
259â†’    }
260â†’
261â†’    private fun setupButtonOrHide(
262â†’        buttonView: Button,
263â†’        text: UiString?,
264â†’        onButtonClick: (() -> Unit)?
265â†’    ) {
266â†’        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(buttonView, text)
267â†’        buttonView.setOnClickListener { onButtonClick?.invoke() }
268â†’    }
269â†’
270â†’    fun scrollToTargetPost(localPostId: LocalPostId) {
271â†’        viewModel.scrollToPost(localPostId)
272â†’    }
273â†’
274â†’    companion object {
275â†’        const val TAG = "post_list_fragment_tag"
276â†’
277â†’        @JvmStatic
278â†’        fun newInstance(
279â†’            site: SiteModel,
280â†’            postListType: PostListType
281â†’        ): PostListFragment {
282â†’            val fragment = PostListFragment()
283â†’            val bundle = Bundle()
284â†’            bundle.putSerializable(WordPress.SITE, site)
285â†’            bundle.putSerializable(EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE, postListType)
286â†’            fragment.arguments = bundle
287â†’            return fragment
288â†’        }
289â†’    }
290â†’}

1â†’package org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs
  2â†’
  3â†’import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.JetpackCapability
  4â†’import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.QuickStartStore.QuickStartTask
  5â†’import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
  6â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.jetpackoverlay.JetpackFeatureRemovalPhase
  7â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.AuthorFilterSelection
  8â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PostListViewLayoutType
  9â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefs.PrefKey
 10â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefs.getBoolean
 11â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.quickstart.QuickStartType
 12â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.tracker.ReaderTab
 13â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.stats.refresh.lists.widget.configuration.StatsColorSelectionViewModel.Color
 14â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.stats.refresh.lists.widget.configuration.StatsColorSelectionViewModel.Color.DARK
 15â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.stats.refresh.lists.widget.configuration.StatsColorSelectionViewModel.Color.LIGHT
 16â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.stats.refresh.lists.widget.configuration.StatsDataTypeSelectionViewModel.DataType
 17â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.stats.refresh.lists.widget.configuration.StatsDataTypeSelectionViewModel.DataType.COMMENTS
 18â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.stats.refresh.lists.widget.configuration.StatsDataTypeSelectionViewModel.DataType.LIKES
 19â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.stats.refresh.lists.widget.configuration.StatsDataTypeSelectionViewModel.DataType.VIEWS
 20â†’import org.wordpress.android.ui.stats.refresh.lists.widget.configuration.StatsDataTypeSelectionViewModel.DataType.VISITORS
 21â†’import org.wordpress.android.usecase.social.JetpackSocialFlow
 22â†’import java.util.Date
 23â†’import javax.inject.Inject
 24â†’import javax.inject.Singleton
 25â†’
 26â†’/**
 27â†’ * Injectable wrapper around AppPrefs.
 28â†’ *
 29â†’ * AppPrefs interface is consisted of static methods, which make the client code difficult to test/mock. Main purpose of
 30â†’ * this wrapper is to make testing easier.
 31â†’ *
 32â†’ */
 33â†’@Singleton
 34â†’class AppPrefsWrapper @Inject constructor() {
 35â†’    var featureAnnouncementShownVersion: Int
 36â†’        get() = AppPrefs.getFeatureAnnouncementShownVersion()
 37â†’        set(version) = AppPrefs.setFeatureAnnouncementShownVersion(version)
 38â†’
 39â†’    var lastFeatureAnnouncementAppVersionCode: Int
 40â†’        get() = AppPrefs.getLastFeatureAnnouncementAppVersionCode()
 41â†’        set(version) = AppPrefs.setLastFeatureAnnouncementAppVersionCode(version)
 42â†’
 43â†’    var avatarVersion: Int
 44â†’        get() = AppPrefs.getAvatarVersion()
 45â†’        set(version) = AppPrefs.setAvatarVersion(version)
 46â†’
 47â†’    var isAztecEditorEnabled: Boolean
 48â†’        get() = AppPrefs.isAztecEditorEnabled()
 49â†’        set(enabled) = AppPrefs.setAztecEditorEnabled(enabled)
 50â†’
 51â†’    var postListAuthorSelection: AuthorFilterSelection
 52â†’        get() = AppPrefs.getAuthorFilterSelection()
 53â†’        set(value) = AppPrefs.setAuthorFilterSelection(value)

 50â†’
 51â†’    @Before
 52â†’    fun setUp() {
 53â†’        val prefs = mock<AppPrefsWrapper> {
 54â†’            on { postListViewLayoutType } doReturn STANDARD
 55â†’        }
 56â†’
 57â†’        whenever(editPostRepository.postChanged).thenReturn(MutableLiveData(Event(PostModel())))

 75â†’        )
 76â†’    }
 77â†’
 78â†’    @Test
 79â†’    fun `when started, it uploads all local drafts`() {
 80â†’        viewModel.start(site, PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE, currentBottomSheetPostId, editPostRepository)
 81â†’
 82â†’        verify(uploadStarter, times(1)).queueUploadFromSite(eq(site))
 83â†’    }

 85â†’    @Test

 87â†’        val testSearch = "keyword"
 88â†’        viewModel.start(site, PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE, currentBottomSheetPostId, editPostRepository)
 89â†’
 90â†’        var searchQuery: String? = null

103â†’
104â†’        var isSearchExpanded = false
105â†’        viewModel.isSearchExpanded.observeForever {
106â†’            isSearchExpanded = it
107â†’        }
108â†’
109â†’        viewModel.onSearchExpanded(false)

111â†’

113â†’        assertThat(isSearchExpanded).isFalse()
114â†’    }

118â†’        val testSearch = "keyword"
119â†’
120â†’        viewModel.start(site, PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE, currentBottomSheetPostId, editPostRepository)
121â†’
122â†’        var searchQuery: String? = null
123â†’        viewModel.searchQuery.observeForever {
124â†’            searchQuery = it

126â†’
127â†’        viewModel.onSearch(testSearch)

133â†’        assertThat(searchQuery).isEqualTo(testSearch)
134â†’
135â†’        viewModel.onSearchCollapsed(0)

137â†’        viewModel.onSearchExpanded(false)
138â†’        assertThat(searchQuery).isNull()
139â†’    }

143â†’        viewModel.start(site, PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE, currentBottomSheetPostId, editPostRepository)
144â†’        assertThat(viewModel.viewLayoutType.value).isEqualTo(STANDARD) // default value

159â†’

162â†’        // arrange
163â†’        val bottomSheetPostId = LocalId(2)
164â†’

167â†’

174â†’        // arrange
175â†’        val bottomSheetPostId = LocalId(0)
176â†’
177â†’        // act

179â†’
180â†’        // assert

182â†’    }
183â†’
184â†’    @Test
185â†’    fun `if post in EditPostRepository is modified then the savePostToDbUseCase should update the post`() {
186â†’        // arrange

188â†’            mock(),
189â†’            mock(),

191â†’            testDispatcher(),
192â†’            testDispatcher()
193â†’        )
194â†’        editPostRepository.set { mock() }
195â†’        val action = { _: PostModel -> true }
196â†’
197â†’        // act

199â†’        // simulates the Publish Date, Status & Visibility or Tags being updated in the bottom sheet.
200â†’        editPostRepository.updateAsync(action, null)

content.text:
Now I have a complete understanding of the codebase. Based on the task list, I need to:

1. Remove the compact layout filter toggle functionality
2. Keep the compact layout for search mode (as it's required by the tests)
3. Remove user preference for layout type
4. Remove menu-related UI state and toggle logic

Let me implement these changes:

220â†’     * Filtering by author is disable on:
221â†’     * 1) Self-hosted sites - The XMLRPC api doesn't support filtering by author.
222â†’     * 2) Jetpack sites - we need to pass in the self-hosted user id to be able to filter for authors
223â†’     * which we currently can't
224â†’     * 3) Sites on which the user doesn't have permissions to edit posts of other users.

226â†’     * This behavior is consistent with Calypso as of 11/4/2019.
227â†’     */

284â†’        _viewState.value = PostListMainViewState(

550â†’    private fun updatePreviewAndDialogState(newState: PostListRemotePreviewState, postInfo: PostInfoType) {

554â†’        AppLog.d(

559â†’        // update the state
560â†’        val prevState = _previewState.value
561â†’        _previewState.postValue(newState)
562â†’
563â†’        // take care of exit actions on state transition
564â†’        previewStateHelper.managePreviewStateTransitions(
565â†’            newState,
566â†’            prevState,
567â†’            postInfo,
568â†’            postActionHandler::handleRemotePreview
569â†’        )

235â†’        }
236â†’        loadedFeaturedImgUrl = imageUrl
237â†’    }
238â†’
239â†’    private fun setTint(context: Context, drawable: Drawable, color: Int): Drawable {
240â†’        val wrappedDrawable: Drawable = DrawableCompat.wrap(drawable)
241â†’        if (color != 0) {
242â†’            val iconColor = context.getColorFromAttribute(color)
243â†’            DrawableCompat.setTint(wrappedDrawable, iconColor)
244â†’        }
245â†’        return wrappedDrawable
246â†’    }
247â†’
248â†’    @Suppress("ComplexMethod")
249â†’    private fun getMenuItemTitleWithIcon(context: Context, item: PostListItemAction): SpannableStringBuilder {
250â†’        var icon: Drawable? = setTint(
251â†’            context,
252â†’            context.getDrawable(item.buttonType.iconResId)!!, item.buttonType.colorAttrId
253â†’        )
254â†’        // If there's no icon, we insert a transparent one to keep the title aligned with the items which have icons.
255â†’        if (icon == null) icon = ColorDrawable(Color.TRANSPARENT)
256â†’        val iconSize: Int = context.getResources().getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.menu_item_icon_size)
257â†’        icon.setBounds(0, 0, iconSize, iconSize)
258â†’        val imageSpan = ImageSpan(icon)
259â†’
260â†’        // Add a space placeholder for the icon, before the title.
261â†’        val menuTitle = context.getText(item.buttonType.textResId)
262â†’        val ssb = SpannableStringBuilder(
263â†’            menuTitle.padStart(menuTitle.length + POST_LIST_ICON_PADDING)
264â†’        )
265â†’
266â†’        // Replace the space placeholder with the icon.
267â†’        ssb.setSpan(imageSpan, 1, 2, 0)
268â†’        return ssb
269â†’    }
270â†’}

208â†’        recyclerView?.adapter = postListAdapter
209â†’
210â†’        swipeRefreshLayout?.let {
211â†’            swipeToRefreshHelper = buildSwipeToRefreshHelper(it) {
212â†’                if (!NetworkUtils.isNetworkAvailable(nonNullActivity)) {
213â†’                    it.isRefreshing = false

216â†’                }
217â†’            }

221â†’
222â†’    /**
223â†’     * Updates the data for the adapter while retaining visible item in certain cases.
224â†’     *
225â†’     * PagedList tries to keep the visible item by adding new items outside of the screen while modifying the scroll
226â†’     * position. In most cases, this works out great because it doesn't interrupt to the user. However, after a new
227â†’     * item is inserted at the top while the list is showing the very first items, it feels very weird to not have the
228â†’     * inserted item shown. For example, if a new draft is added there is no indication of it except for the flash
229â†’     * of the scroll bar which is not noticeable unless user is paying attention to it.
230â†’     *
231â†’     * In these cases, we try to keep the scroll position the same instead of keeping the visible item the same by
232â†’     * first saving the state and re-applying it after the data updates are completed. Since `PagedListAdapter` uses
233â†’     * bg thread to calculate the changes, we need to post the change in the bg thread as well so that it'll be applied
234â†’     * after changes are reflected.
235â†’     */
236â†’    private fun updatePagedListData(pagedListData: PagedPostList) {
237â†’        val recyclerViewState = recyclerView?.layoutManager?.onSaveInstanceState()
238â†’        postListAdapter.submitList(pagedListData)
239â†’        recyclerView?.post {
240â†’            (recyclerView?.layoutManager as? LinearLayoutManager)?.let { layoutManager ->
241â†’                if (layoutManager.findFirstVisibleItemPosition() < MAX_INDEX_FOR_VISIBLE_ITEM_TO_KEEP_SCROLL_POSITION) {
242â†’                    layoutManager.onRestoreInstanceState(recyclerViewState)
243â†’                }
244â†’            }
245â†’        }
246â†’    }
247â†’
248â†’    private fun updateEmptyViewForState(state: PostListEmptyUiState) {
249â†’        actionableEmptyView?.let { emptyView ->
250â†’            if (state.emptyViewVisible) {
251â†’                emptyView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
252â†’                uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(emptyView.title, state.title)
253â†’                uiHelpers.setImageOrHide(emptyView.image, state.imgResId)
254â†’                setupButtonOrHide(emptyView.button, state.buttonText, state.onButtonClick)
255â†’            } else {
256â†’                emptyView.visibility = View.GONE
257â†’            }
258â†’        }
259â†’    }
260â†’
261â†’    private fun setupButtonOrHide(
262â†’        buttonView: Button,
263â†’        text: UiString?,
264â†’        onButtonClick: (() -> Unit)?
265â†’    ) {
266â†’        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(buttonView, text)
267â†’        buttonView.setOnClickListener { onButtonClick?.invoke() }
268â†’    }
269â†’
270â†’    fun scrollToTargetPost(localPostId: LocalPostId) {
271â†’        viewModel.scrollToPost(localPostId)
272â†’    }

275â†’        const val TAG = "post_list_fragment_tag"
276â†’

278â†’        fun newInstance(
279â†’            site: SiteModel,
280â†’            postListType: PostListType
281â†’        ): PostListFragment {
282â†’            val fragment = PostListFragment()
283â†’            val bundle = Bundle()
284â†’            bundle.putSerializable(WordPress.SITE, site)
285â†’            bundle.putSerializable(EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE, postListType)
286â†’            fragment.arguments = bundle
287â†’            return fragment
288â†’        }
289â†’    }

220â†’     * Filtering by author is disable on:

222â†’     * 2) Jetpack sites - we need to pass in the self-hosted user id to be able to filter for authors
223â†’     * which we currently can't
224â†’     * 3) Sites on which the user doesn't have permissions to edit posts of other users.

226â†’     * This behavior is consistent with Calypso as of 11/4/2019.
227â†’     */

498â†’        authorFilterItems: List<AuthorFilterListItemUIState>? = null
499â†’    ) {
500â†’        val currentState = requireNotNull(viewState.value) {
501â†’            "updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange should not be called before the initial state is set"
502â†’        }
503â†’
504â†’        _viewState.value = PostListMainViewState(
505â†’            isFabVisible ?: currentState.isFabVisible,
506â†’            isAuthorFilterVisible ?: currentState.isAuthorFilterVisible,
507â†’            authorFilterSelection ?: currentState.authorFilterSelection,
508â†’            authorFilterItems ?: currentState.authorFilterItems
509â†’        )
510â†’
511â†’        if (authorFilterSelection != null && currentState.authorFilterSelection != authorFilterSelection) {
512â†’            _authorSelectionUpdated.value = authorFilterSelection
513â†’
514â†’            AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(
515â†’                POST_LIST_AUTHOR_FILTER_CHANGED,

358â†’    private fun PostListActivityBinding.loadViewState(state: PostListMainViewState) {
359â†’        if (state.isFabVisible) {
360â†’            fabButton.show()
361â†’        } else {
362â†’            fabButton.hide()
363â†’        }
364â†’
365â†’        // The author selection is in the toolbar, which doesn't get initialized until
366â†’        // after loadViewState is invoked. After the toolbar is initialized, the state is
367â†’        // updated and the adapter can be set properly. The visibility of the author filter
368â†’        // is handled in the viewModel itself
369â†’        if (::authorFilterMenuItem.isInitialized && ::authorFilterSpinner.isInitialized) {
370â†’            authorFilterMenuItem.isVisible = state.isAuthorFilterVisible
371â†’
372â†’            val authorSelectionAdapter = authorFilterSpinner.adapter as AuthorSelectionAdapter
373â†’            authorSelectionAdapter.updateItems(state.authorFilterItems)
374â†’
375â†’            authorSelectionAdapter.getIndexOfSelection(state.authorFilterSelection)?.let { selectionIndex ->
376â†’                authorFilterSpinner.setSelection(selectionIndex)
377â†’            }
378â†’        }
379â†’    }

402â†’    private fun loadIntentData(intent: Intent) {
403â†’        if (intent.hasExtra(ARG_NOTIFICATION_TYPE)) {

407â†’            systemNotificationTracker.trackTappedNotification(notificationType)

411â†’        if (targetPostId != -1) {
412â†’            viewModel.showTargetPost(targetPostId)
413â†’        }
414â†’    }
